text: did the venue confirm our date for Lighting the Way? I want the headcount locked before we open tickets
yes, signed contract came back this morning. Oct 17, room holds 180. I'll forward it to the shared folder
perfect. Sarah, can you schedule the save-the-date post once Derek drops the graphic? link to tickets, no dollar figure
on it. I'll queue it for Monday morning when engagement is highest
thank you both. heads up I may be slow to reply this week, work is heavy. go ahead without me if needed
